summary: Regression testing completed after major refactoring. Backend split into modular routers (auth, users, worlds, ai, gallery, reviews, versions, misc) and frontend split into React components with shared AppContext. All 43 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working including new social features (follow/unfollow, notifications) and enhanced permissions (world ownership).

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console for all dialogs

passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns 200 with healthy status
Backend: Root endpoint returns API info with version
Backend: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@hytale.builder)
Backend: Login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user when authenticated
Backend: Register new user creates account and sets cookies
Backend: Register with duplicate email returns 400
Backend: Logout clears cookies and session
Backend: GET /api/worlds returns list of worlds
Backend: POST /api/worlds creates new world with owner_id
Backend: POST /api/worlds/from-template creates world from template
Backend: POST /api/gallery/publish publishes world to gallery
Backend: POST /api/notifications/read-all marks all as read
Backend: GET /api/users/{id}/profile returns profile with followers_count and following_count
Frontend: App loads with header, sidebar, AI panel
Frontend: Sign In button opens auth dialog
Frontend: Login works with admin credentials
Frontend: Profile button shows user name in header
Frontend: Notifications bell appears when logged in
Frontend: Profile dialog shows followers/following counts
Frontend: Version history button appears when logged in and world loaded
Frontend: Visibility toggle button appears when logged in
Frontend: Gallery dialog opens with entries
Frontend: Review button visible in gallery when logged in
Frontend: All tools visible (Select, Zone, Prefab, Pan)
Frontend: Terrain sliders visible at bottom
critical_code_review_comments: Modular router architecture properly implemented - all routes correctly prefixed and included
Cookie-based auth with httpOnly cookies working correctly
World ownership (owner_id) properly enforced with 403 for non-owners
Profile includes followers_count and following_count as expected
Minor: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby (accessibility improvement)
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on backend startup. Test users created during testing for social feature tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major refactoring regression test completed successfully. Backend now uses modular routers in /app/backend/routes/. Frontend uses React components in /app/frontend/src/components/app/ with shared AppContext. New social features (follow/unfollow, notifications) fully functional. World ownership permissions (owner_id) enforced with 403 for non-owners. Cookie-based auth with httpOnly cookies. All 43 backend tests and all frontend features verified working.

backend_routers: auth.py - Authentication (register, login, logout, me, refresh)
worlds.py - World CRUD, zones, prefabs, visibility, exports
gallery.py - Gallery publish, browse, like, download
frontend_components: Header.jsx - App header with user menu, notifications
Sidebar.jsx - Worlds list, tools, zoom, actions
new_features_tested: Social: Notifications (new_follower, new_publication, world_liked, world_downloaded, new_review)
Permissions: World ownership with 403 for non-owners on edit/delete
Profile: followers_count and following_count in profile response
